name: Montage: Beat 2: The Road to Hrafnborg

text.content:
Beat 2: The Road to Hrafnborg

Act: Act 1 | Type: Montage Scene

Overview

The Road to Hrafnborg

Level: 1 | Beat: 2
Location: The Lantern Road
Type: Travel montage (Easy, 2–3 days)
Tone: Cold fellowship, growing dread, first blood

The PCs travel to Hrafnborg along the failing Lantern Road. Strangers bound by the same grim duty share a road, a fire, and their suspicions. This montage covers the journey before the party reaches the graveyard outside Hrafnborg — where the dead will rise for the first time.

Running This Scene

This is a narrative montage — a series of challenges the party faces as a group. Rather than a single roll, play this out as a sequence of scenes where each character contributes.

GM Guidance

  • Go around the table and ask each player how their character is helping.
  • Call for ability checks as appropriate — suggested modified [Resolute←10] (easy).
  • Let creative approaches succeed with good roleplaying, even without a roll.
  • Use the complications below as prompts — not every one needs to come up.
  • The goal is collaborative storytelling, not a pass/fail test.

Relevant Skills:

  • Strong
  • Quick or Discreet
  • Cunning or Cunning
  • Vigilant, Vigilant, or Vigilant
  • Persuasive, Persuasive, or Persuasive

Complications & Challenges

Use these as dramatic beats during the montage. Present them as situations the party must navigate together.

Navigate the Lantern Road (Cunning or Cunning, modified [Resolute←10])

Stay on failing roads, read buried markers, avoid dead-end detours. The road splits and rejoins — choosing the wrong fork adds hours.

Endure the Cold (Strong, modified [Resolute←10])

Resist frostbite, carry gear through snowdrifts, ford frozen streams. The supplies must last days, not hours.

Find Shelter at Night (Vigilant, Vigilant, or Vigilant, modified [Resolute←10])

Locate wind-breaks, abandoned crofts, or natural shelters before the temperature drops to lethal ranges.

Avoid Trouble on the Road (Quick or Discreet, modified [Resolute←10])

Slip past bandit camps, desperate refugees, or rival groups who suspect why you're heading toward Hrafnborg while everyone else flees.

Outcomes

Based on how the party performed, use the following as a guide:

Total Success

Arrive rested and supplied. No Heat loss. Earn 1 Victory.

Partial Success

Arrive tired. Lose 1 day's rations (Heat) or one piece of minor equipment is damaged (Weight).

Total Failure

Arrive exhausted and rattled. One PC has a condition (frostbitten or exhausted). Lose 2 days' rations. Director gains 2 additional Malice for the graveyard scene.
